/usr/bin/c++   -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/redis.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/server.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/map_ep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/stat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/comms.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/workers.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/memalloc.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/directory.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/records.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/arg_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/slog.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/map_server_eps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/cfg_parse.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/crc.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/imss.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/shared_memory.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/policies.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_server.dir/__/src/hercules.cpp.o -o ../hercules_server   -L/home/gabrielo/Documents/hercules/build/app  -L/usr/include  -Wl,-rpath,/home/gabrielo/Documents/hercules/build/app:/usr/include: -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcre.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libucp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libucs.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so
